summary: Owner-only data publishing for hosted MCPs: list, finalize and delete the artifacts (vectors/blobs) backing your provider. The bytes upload over the authenticated chunked HTTP endpoint.

tools.name: list_datasets
tools.description: List the artifacts declared by a provider you own, each with its upload status: bytes stored, sha256, and last upload time, or 'pending' if not yet uploaded.

tools.name: get_upload_target
tools.description: Return the authenticated chunked HTTP upload URL and instructions for pushing the bytes of one declared artifact of a provider you own. You must be the provider owner.

tools.name: finalize_upload
tools.description: Finalize a previously uploaded artifact for a provider you own: verify the bytes are present, then record their size and sha256 so the provider can serve them. You must be the provider owner.

tools.name: delete_dataset
tools.description: Delete the uploaded bytes and recorded metadata of one artifact for a provider you own. The artifact declaration in provider.json is unaffected. You must be the provider owner.
